name: drapo-bridge
description: Drapo Bridge browser extension for pixel-faithful page screenshots.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome && node scripts/package-extension.mjs edge
scripts.build:customer: npm run clean && npm run compile && node scripts/package-extension.mjs customer
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && npm run compile:dev && node scripts/package-extension.mjs dev
